title: [sentinel-qa] TEST-ONLY — DO NOT ACTION: check blank line consistency in crosslink --help output (PR #553 QA)
description:
Sentinel signal: GH#560:replicate

**This issue exists only to exercise the sentinel replicate dispatcher for PR #553 QA. Will be closed once verification is complete — DO NOT action, DO NOT merge any agent output.**

## Observed (possibly)

It looks like `crosslink --help` may have inconsistent blank-line spacing between the `Commands:` section and the `Options:` section — sometimes one blank line, sometimes two. Purely cosmetic.

## Expected

Consistent single blank line between each section of the help output.

## Agent task (replicate only)

1. Capture `crosslink --help` stdout
2. Write a test in `tests/` that parses section boundaries and asserts consistent spacing
3. Run the test and report whether it fails or passes
4. If the test passes (no inconsistency), record a `resolution` comment noting the issue could not be reproduced

Either outcome — a failing test or a clean "cannot reproduce" — demonstrates the sentinel dispatch mechanism works.

## Severity

Cosmetic only. No production impact.
